name: German Chocolate Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and set aside.
2. In a bowl, combine the sugar and baking cocoa.
3. Stir in the evaporated milk, beaten eggs, melted butter or margarine, and vanilla.
4. Mix in the coconut flakes and chopped pecans.
5. Pour the mixture into two unbaked pie shells.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F for 40 minutes or until set around the edges.
7. Cool on racks.
Makes 2 pies of 6 servings each.
